_comment: Third-party tool logos for the logo-flash beat (track-index 7, small + clean on a neutral ground, flashed ~0.5-1s when a tool is named; see frame.md). Marks used nominatively to identify the named tool. Most are brand-coloured SVGs (visible on dark grounds); the OpenAI/chatgpt mark inherits currentColor, so set the flash element's color. Every filled entry is mirrored in ../../../licenses/logo-usage-notes.md. An empty 'file' is still a drop-in TODO.

Simple Icons — icon CC0 1.0; Make (Integromat) trademark, nominative use
Simple Icons — icon CC0 1.0; Zapier trademark, nominative use

logos.note: TODO drop-in — not in Simple Icons or svgl. Export the official mark from gohighlevel.com brand assets and log it here + in logo-usage-notes.md.
